original_image_tags: Back of a document page, likely carbon copy or reverse side of a teletype message. Paper is aged, off-white/beige with two punch holes at the top. Blue ink stamps are visible at right and bottom left. Faint, reversed text from the front side bleeds through the paper.
Bottom left corner stamp, oriented upside down relative to the page orientation, reading:

elements.description: Page with two black hole-punch marks at the top, two visible rubber stamps, and faint reversed text from the opposite side of the page. One blue stamp reads 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT JUL 4 3 32 PM '50 F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. A second blue stamp reads 'RECEIVED - DIRECTOR F B I U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE JUL 4 5 45 PM '50'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content: two punch holes at the top, two blue stamps, and faint reversed text bleed-through, but Description B adds specific quoted text for the stamps that Description A does not provide.
